action.reasoning: Observation: Best remains 0.594 (iter16: replay 500/task + KD beta=0.5/T=2 + consol=5). Iters 17-19 dropped sharply (0.58->0.35->0.09) with task9 loss~6.0, train_acc~0.04 (random), val~0.06 during tasks then minor consol recovery; stdout confirms underfitting on late tasks; curves show logs but no progress. Analysis: Root cause is workspace train.py truncation (ends at 'train_'; incomplete loop/optimizer/KD after mem update) preventing learning on tasks>0 despite good prior runs. Replay+KD+consol+best-val selection proven effective at 0.59 with balanced early/late task accs (~0.48-0.7). Decision: Fully rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated train.py (mem=550/task balanced per-class via meta+torch.where/randperm, epochs/task=7, consol=6@1e-4, Adam(4e-4 wd=1e-5), full KD with KLDiv on softmax(T=2.0)*T**2 beta=0.5, cosine scheduler per-task, dense logging every 20 steps + val/best per epoch, deepcopy old_model, final best ckpt). Keep model.py/predict.py. Expect recover >0.59, target >0.61. Run training then submit_eval.
